testedConfigurations: NVOS 6.7 with Java SE Runtime Environment v8 (1.8) running on Vision ONE with Intel i7 3555LE (Ivy Bridge)
certificate.moduleName: Keysight BC-FJA (Bouncy Castle FIPS Java API) for Network Visibility
certificate.caveat: When operated in approved mode. No assurance of the minimum strength of generated SSPs (e.g., keys).
certificate.description: The Keysight Technologies BC-FJA (Bouncy Castle FIPS Java API) is integrated into Keysight’s network visibility product family to provide FIPS 140-3 validated cryptography for the protection of sensitive information.
